languages.text: {n}Предок не медлит с ответом ни секунды.{/n} "Вор, укравший то, что было даровано нашему роду самим Императором, должен понести самое ужасное наказание, которое навсегда отвадит его иметь с нами дело. Я готов".

{n}Your ancestor does not hesitate for even a second.{/n} "The thief who stole what was bestowed upon our line by the Emperor Himself must suffer most terrible punishment, so that he will never again seek to cross our path. I am ready."
languages.original_text: {n}Предок не медлит с ответом ни секунды.{/n} "Вор, укравший то, что было даровано нашему роду самим Императором, должен понести самое ужасное наказание, которое навсегда отвадит его иметь с нами дело. Я готов".

traits.locale_text: {n}Your ancestor does not hesitate for even a second.{/n} "The thief who stole what was bestowed upon our line by the Emperor Himself must suffer most terrible punishment, so that he will never again seek to cross our path. I am ready."

{n}Your ancestor does not hesitate for even a second.{/n} "The thief who stole what was bestowed upon our line by the Emperor Himself must suffer most terrible punishment, so that he will never again seek to cross our path. I am ready."

{n}Your ancestor does not hesitate for even a second.{/n} "The thief who stole what was bestowed upon our line by the Emperor Himself must suffer most terrible punishment, so that he will never again seek to cross our path. I am ready."

languages.text: {n}祖先が一瞬も躊躇しない。 {/n}「天皇陛下が我家に授けたものを盗んだ賊は、二度と我々を犯すことがないように、最も恐ろしい罰を受けるべきだ。私は覚悟している。」
languages.original_text: {n}Your ancestor does not hesitate for even a second.{/n} "The thief who stole what was bestowed upon our line by the Emperor Himself must suffer most terrible punishment, so that he will never again seek to cross our path. I am ready."

traits.locale_text: 祖先が一瞬も躊躇しない。 「天皇陛下が我家に授けたものを盗んだ賊は、二度と我々を犯すことがないように、最も恐ろしい罰を受けるべきだ。私は覚悟している。」

languages.text: {n}Tu antepasado no titubea ni un momento.{/n} «El ladrón que robó lo que el mismísimo Emperador otorgó a nuestro linaje merece el mayor de los castigos, para que no se le ocurra cruzarse en nuestro camino de nuevo. Estoy listo».
languages.original_text: {n}Your ancestor does not hesitate for even a second.{/n} "The thief who stole what was bestowed upon our line by the Emperor Himself must suffer most terrible punishment, so that he will never again seek to cross our path. I am ready."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tu antepasado no titubea ni un momento.{/n} «El ladrón que robó lo que el mismísimo Emperador otorgó a nuestro linaje merece el mayor de los castigos, para que no se le ocurra cruzarse en nuestro camino de nuevo. Estoy listo».

languages.text: {n}你的先祖没有丝毫迟疑。{/n}“当然。窃取帝皇亲赐吾族之物的贼人，必须遭受最严酷的惩罚，好叫他永世不敢再与我们作对。”
languages.original_text: {n}Your ancestor does not hesitate for even a second.{/n} "The thief who stole what was bestowed upon our line by the Emperor Himself must suffer most terrible punishment, so that he will never again seek to cross our path. I am ready."

traits.locale_text: {n}你的先祖没有丝毫迟疑。{/n}“当然。窃取帝皇亲赐吾族之物的贼人，必须遭受最严酷的惩罚，好叫他永世不敢再与我们作对。”

languages.text: {n}Dein Vorfahr zögert nicht eine Sekunde.{/n} "Der Dieb, der stahl, was unserer Linie vom Imperator Selbst gewährt wurde, muss eine entsetzliche Strafe erfahren, damit er uns fortan aus dem Weg geht. Ich bin bereit."
languages.original_text: {n}Your ancestor does not hesitate for even a second.{/n} "The thief who stole what was bestowed upon our line by the Emperor Himself must suffer most terrible punishment, so that he will never again seek to cross our path. I am ready."

traits.locale_text: {n}Dein Vorfahr zögert nicht eine Sekunde.{/n} "Der Dieb, der stahl, was unserer Linie vom Imperator Selbst gewährt wurde, muss eine entsetzliche Strafe erfahren, damit er uns fortan aus dem Weg geht. Ich bin bereit."

languages.text: {n}Atan bir saniye bile tereddüt etmiyor.{/n} "Bizzat İmparator'un soyumuza bahşettiği şeyi çalan hırsız, bir daha asla yolumuza çıkmaya yeltenmemesi için en korkunç cezayı çekmeli. Ben hazırım."
languages.original_text: {n}Your ancestor does not hesitate for even a second.{/n} "The thief who stole what was bestowed upon our line by the Emperor Himself must suffer most terrible punishment, so that he will never again seek to cross our path. I am ready."

traits.locale_text: {n}Atan bir saniye bile tereddüt etmiyor.{/n} "Bizzat İmparator'un soyumuza bahşettiği şeyi çalan hırsız, bir daha asla yolumuza çıkmaya yeltenmemesi için en korkunç cezayı çekmeli. Ben hazırım."

languages.text: {n}Votre ancêtre n'hésite pas une seconde.{/n} « Le voleur qui s'est approprié ce que l'Empereur Lui-même a accordé à notre lignée mérite un châtiment à la hauteur de ce crime. Nous lui passerons l'envie de s'en prendre à nous une nouvelle fois. Je suis prêt. »
languages.original_text: {n}Your ancestor does not hesitate for even a second.{/n} "The thief who stole what was bestowed upon our line by the Emperor Himself must suffer most terrible punishment, so that he will never again seek to cross our path. I am ready."
